facts_disclosed: Mom works at Eire Pub in Dorchester 20 years

turns.content: need help figurin out a christmas gift for my girl shes impossible to shop for and I always end up gettin somethin last minute that sucks

I got you! To point you in the right direction, it'd help to know a little about her. What's she into? And what's your budget looking like? Also, how long have you two been together? That usually changes the level of gift.

her names megan weve been together about 2 years now so I cant be gettin her like a gift card or somethin basic like that lol. shes into like skincare stuff and she just started gettin into yoga. budget is probly like 100 150 I cant go crazy right now

Two years in, yeah, you definitely need something with some thought behind it. With $100-150 and her being into skincare and yoga, here are some solid ideas:

1. A nice skincare set from a brand like Tatcha or Drunk Elephant — those run $50-90 for a gift set and girls go crazy for them
2. A Lululemon yoga mat (the good ones are around $80-90) plus a cute yoga bag
3. A spa day or massage gift card at a local spot — let her pick her own treatments
4. A combo: a smaller skincare item plus a yoga class package somewhere near her

Do you know what skincare brands she already uses? That can help narrow it down.

bro I have no idea what brand she uses theres like 50 bottles in her bathroom lol. the lululemon thing is smart tho she likes that store. or maybe the spa thing she works at a dental office and shes always sayin her back hurts from leanin over people all day

The spa gift is probably your best move then. If her back's always hurting, a massage gift certificate would feel super thoughtful — like you actually listen when she talks about her day. That goes a long way at the two-year mark.

Look up some good spas in your area and get a gift card for a 60 or 90-minute massage. You could pair it with something small like a candle or a bath bomb set to round it out. She'll love it and you come out looking like you planned it for weeks. Where are you guys located — I can try to suggest a place?
were in boston shes in dorchester actually her apartment is like right near where my mom works. my moms been workin at the eire pub in dorchester for like 20 years so I know the area wicked well

Oh nice, so you know Dorchester inside and out then. For spas near there, you could check out places along Dot Ave or even look into some spots in South End or Back Bay — not too far and they tend to have more upscale spa options that'd make it feel like a treat.

A few things to search for: "massage spa Dorchester" or "day spa South Boston" and read the Google reviews. A lot of the smaller local places actually give better massages than the big chains and they're usually a bit cheaper too. You could get a 60-minute massage for like $80-100 and still have budget left for a little something extra.

Your mom working at the Eire Pub for 20 years is impressive by the way — that place is a Dorchester institution.

yeah she basically runs the place at this point everyone in there knows her by name. hardest workin person I know no cap between her and my dad I got no excuse to not put in the work you know. but yeah let me look up some spa spots thats a really good idea actually

Sounds like you come from some hardworking people for real. And yeah, the spa gift is a winner — it shows you pay attention and it's something she'd never buy for herself. 

When you book it, one pro tip: write a little note on a card saying something like "you deserve a break" or whatever feels natural. Don't overthink it, just something short. Two years together, the personal touch matters more than the dollar amount. She'll appreciate it way more than some random thing you grabbed off Amazon the night before.

lol thats literally what I did last year I got her some perfume off amazon the day before christmas and she was not impressed. I aint good at this stuff bro like I can wire a whole house but I cant figure out a christmas present to save my life

Ha, at least you're self-aware about it! That's why you're planning ahead this time — December 3rd and you're already on it, that's progress. Last-minute Amazon perfume is a classic mistake, we've all been there.

Seriously though, just go with the spa thing and maybe grab a small Lululemon item to go with it — like a headband or water bottle or something. Wrap them up nice. She's gonna be way happier than the perfume incident. You got this.
ok bet im gonna do the spa gift card and maybe one of those lulu headband things you said. megans gonna be hyped I actually planned somethin for once. good lookin out bro
You're set man. Megan's gonna love it. Just don't wait until December 24th to actually go buy it — you've got the plan, now just execute. Have a good one!
haha facts im gonna go this weekend while shes at work so she dont see. appreciate the help for real im bad at this stuff without someone helpin me think it through lol later
Smart move going while she's at work. You got this, it's gonna be a solid Christmas. Take care man!
